query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.isActive, pc.cityId, c.name as cityName
FROM partners p
LEFT JOIN partner_cities pc ON p.id = pc.partnerId
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE p.name LIKE '%test%';
